1628932.name: A'ja Wilson
1628932.injDetail: Wilson (leg) is listed as out for Sunday's game against the Fever.

1642801.name: Aaliyah Nye
1642801.injDetail: Nye (knee) is questionable for Thursday's game against the Storm.

1641648.name: Aliyah Boston
1641648.injDetail: Boston (lower leg) is out for Wednesday's game against the Sparks but will be available for Thursday's game against Phoenix, per Chloe Peterson of The Indianapolis Star.

1629539.name: Amy Okonkwo
1629539.injDetail: Okonkwo (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against Golden State.

1642800.name: Aneesah Morrow
1642800.injDetail: Morrow is out for Wednesday's game against the Lynx due to personal reasons.

1643437.name: Ashlon Jackson
1643437.injDetail: Jackson (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Wednesday's game against the Lynx.

1641695.name: Ashten Prechtel
1641695.injDetail: Prechtel (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Wednesday's game against the Tempo.

203398.name: Brittney Griner
203398.injDetail: Griner is out for Wednesday's game against the Lynx due to a left quadriceps strain.

1628279.name: Brittney Sykes
1628279.injDetail: Sykes (foot) will be re-evaluated in the coming weeks, according to WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland.

1642287.name: Cameron Brink
1642287.injDetail: Brink (ankle) will be re-evaluated in two weeks, John W. Davis of Long Beach Press-Telegram reports.

1643488.name: Emma Cechova
1643488.injDetail: Cechova (knee) was diagnosed with a torn ACL in her right knee and will undergo surgery, Meghan L. Hall of USA Today reports. She will miss the remainder of the season.

1642817.name: Hailey Van Lith
1642817.injDetail: Van Lith (coach's decision) is out for Wednesday's game against the Lynx.

1643505.name: Jovana Nogic
1643505.injDetail: Nogic (not injury related) intends to play professionally in Russia and won't return to Phoenix this season, Aya Abdeen of TheIXSports.com reports.

1628317.name: Karlie Samuelson
1628317.injDetail: Samuelson (finger) is listed as out for Saturday's game against Seattle.

1628276.name: Kelsey Plum
1628276.injDetail: Plum has suffered a lower left leg injury and will be re-evaluated in four weeks, Mitchell Hansen of CanisHoopus.com reports.

1643445.name: Kiki Rice
1643445.injDetail: Rice (ankle) remains sidelined by a Grade 3 left ankle sprain, according to WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland.

1630142.name: Leonie Fiebich
1630142.injDetail: Fiebich (foot) has been ruled out for Tuesday's game against Dallas.

1642818.name: Maddy Westbeld
1642818.injDetail: Westbeld (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Tuesday's game against the Mercury, Kareem Copeland of ESPN reports.

1631039.name: Miela Sowah
1631039.injDetail: Sowah (coach's decision) is out for Wednesday's game against the Tempo.

1643426.name: Olivia Miles
1643426.injDetail: Miles (calf) is out for Wednesday's game against the Sun.

1643706.name: Ornella Bankole
1643706.injDetail: Bankole (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Wednesday's game against Golden State.

204296.name: Rebecca Allen
204296.injDetail: Allen sustained an apparent nasal injury in the fourth quarter of Tuesday's 88-77 loss to the Wings and did not return, finishing with one block in four minutes.

1642288.name: Rickea Jackson
1642288.injDetail: The Sky announced Tuesday that Jackson will miss the remainder of the season after suffering a torn ACL in her left knee during Sunday's 86-79 win over the Lynx.

1643470.name: Shay Ciezki
1643470.injDetail: Ciezki (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Tuesday's game against the Sky.

203400.name: Skylar Diggins
203400.injDetail: Diggins (knee) has been ruled out for Tuesday's game against Phoenix.

1642785.name: Sonia Citron
1642785.injDetail: Citron (knee) is out for Monday's game against the Valkyries.

1643473.name: Taina Mair
1643473.injDetail: Mair (coach's decision) is out for Thursday's game against the Dream.

1627701.name: Temi Fagbenle
1627701.injDetail: Fagbenle (eye) is out for Wednesday's game against the Valkyries, Chelsea Leite of TSN reports.
